Notice Of Petition And Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Government Code 945.4
Off Calendar Jan-05-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its Tentative Ruling: PETITIONER LOUIS LAMOT'S Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Government Code 945.4: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party shall submit a proposed form of order. (301/JLW/) REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR1558
